untranslatable_reason: PDI (Plus Directional Indicator) and MDI (Minus Directional Indicator) are not in the allowed indicator list. These are components of the ADX system but are not separately available in the allowed indicators (only adx_14 is provided). To implement this signal, PDI and MDI would need to be added to the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a classic always-in-the-market reversal system using directional indicators. Entry and exit conditions are reversal-based with execution on next day's open. The position_management parameter 'always_in_market' is enforced by making exit conditions trigger entry conditions of the opposite direction.
